name: filthy-panty
description: Serverless, multi-account AI agent harness built on AWS Lambda and Bun. The open-source engine behind BeeBlast.

scripts.check: bun run --filter @filthy-panty/core check && bun run --filter @filthy-panty/convex check && bun run --filter filthy-panty check && bun run --filter @filthy-panty/demos check
